title: ConsistencyScoreCard
description: Quantitative validation scorecard produced by M49 QuantitativeValidationRunner. Compares computed observables against external targets using pull statistics. Reference campaigns may mix toy-placeholder controls, derived-synthetic checks, and stronger benchmark targets.

studyId.description: Unique study identifier for this validation run

matches.description: All target match records from this validation run

totalTargets.description: Total external targets declared in the target table

matchedTargetCount.description: Number of external targets with at least one matching computed observable

missingTargetCount.description: Number of external targets without a matching computed observable

targetCoverage.description: Coverage status for every target declared in the target table

totalPassed.description: Number of target comparisons where pull <= sigmaThreshold

totalFailed.description: Number of target comparisons where pull > sigmaThreshold

overallScore.description: Fraction of comparisons that passed: totalPassed / (totalPassed + totalFailed). NaN if no matches.

calibrationPolicyId.description: ID of the CalibrationPolicy used for this run

observableId.description: Observable identifier requested by the target

status.description: Whether this target had at least one matching computed observable

candidateCount.description: Number of computed observables matching the target selectors

targetEnvironmentId.description: Requested environment ID selector from the target

targetEnvironmentTier.description: Requested environment tier selector from the target

notes.description: Optional diagnostic note for missing or ambiguous coverage

targetLabel.description: Human-readable label for the target (e.g., particle name or ratio description)

targetValue.description: Target reference value. For toy studies, use eigenvalue ratios normalized to largest eigenvalue.

targetUncertainty.description: Target 1-sigma uncertainty. Set to a large value for toy-placeholder targets.

computedValue.description: Computed observable value from the GU pipeline

computedUncertainty.description: Computed total uncertainty. -1 means unestimated (never zero).

pull.description: Pull statistic: |computed - target| / sqrt(sigma_computed^2 + sigma_target^2). If sigma_computed=-1 (unestimated), uses sigma_target only in denominator.

passed.description: True if pull <= sigmaThreshold from the calibration policy (default 5.0)

computedEnvironmentId.description: Environment ID of the computed observable that supplied this match.

computedEnvironmentTier.description: Environment tier of the computed observable that supplied this match.

computedBranchId.description: Branch ID of the computed observable that supplied this match.

computedRefinementLevel.description: Refinement level of the computed observable that supplied this match.

targetSource.description: Source label from the target table.

targetProvenance.description: Optional provenance label from the target table.

targetEvidenceTier.description: Evidence tier label from the target table.

targetEnvironmentId.description: Requested environment ID selector from the target.

targetEnvironmentTier.description: Requested environment tier selector from the target.

QuantitativeUncertainty.description: Four independent uncertainty sources. Each field is -1 if unestimated (never zero). Total = sqrt(sum of squares of estimated components).

branchVariation.description: Uncertainty from branch choice variation. -1 = unestimated.

refinementError.description: Uncertainty from finite mesh refinement (discretization error). -1 = unestimated.

extractionError.description: Uncertainty from the extraction/fitting method (e.g., eigenvalue ratio extraction). -1 = unestimated.

totalUncertainty.description: Total uncertainty = sqrt(branchVariation^2 + refinementError^2 + extractionError^2 + environmentSensitivity^2) over estimated components only. -1 if no components estimated.

sigmaThreshold.description: Maximum allowed pull for a comparison to pass

requireFullUncertainty.description: If true, fail any observable with unestimated computed uncertainty

observableId.description: Observable ID this target applies to

value.description: Target value. For toy studies, use eigenvalue ratios (normalize to largest eigenvalue), not raw eigenvalues.

source.description: Provenance string for the target source.

evidenceTier.description: Evidence tier label, for example 'toy-placeholder', 'derived-synthetic', or 'evidence-grade'. Never 'physical-prediction'.

targetProvenance.description: Optional provenance string distinct from source when the target was bridged or normalized.

targetEnvironmentId.description: Optional environment ID selector for this target.

targetEnvironmentTier.description: Optional environment tier selector for this target.

notes.description: Optional diagnostic notes for the target.
